# Capabilities
Aspire.Hosting.JavaScript/addJavaScriptApp(name: string, appDirectory: string, runScriptName?: string) -> Aspire.Hosting.JavaScript/Aspire.Hosting.JavaScript.JavaScriptAppResource
Aspire.Hosting.JavaScript/addNextJsApp(name: string, appDirectory: string, runScriptName?: string) -> Aspire.Hosting.JavaScript/Aspire.Hosting.JavaScript.NextJsAppResource
Aspire.Hosting.JavaScript/addNodeApp(name: string, appDirectory: string, scriptPath: string) -> Aspire.Hosting.JavaScript/Aspire.Hosting.JavaScript.NodeAppResource
Aspire.Hosting.JavaScript/addViteApp(name: string, appDirectory: string, runScriptName?: string) -> Aspire.Hosting.JavaScript/Aspire.Hosting.JavaScript.ViteAppResource
Aspire.Hosting.JavaScript/disableBuildValidation() -> Aspire.Hosting.JavaScript/Aspire.Hosting.JavaScript.NextJsAppResource
Aspire.Hosting.JavaScript/publishAsNodeServer(entryPoint: string, outputPath?: string) -> Aspire.Hosting.JavaScript/Aspire.Hosting.JavaScript.JavaScriptAppResource
Aspire.Hosting.JavaScript/publishAsNpmScript(startScriptName?: string, runScriptArguments?: string) -> Aspire.Hosting.JavaScript/Aspire.Hosting.JavaScript.JavaScriptAppResource
Aspire.Hosting.JavaScript/publishAsStaticWebsite(apiPath?: string, apiTarget?: Aspire.Hosting/Aspire.Hosting.IResourceWithServiceDiscovery, outputPath?: string, stripPrefix?: boolean, targetEndpointName?: string) -> Aspire.Hosting.JavaScript/Aspire.Hosting.JavaScript.JavaScriptAppResource
Aspire.Hosting.JavaScript/withBrowserDebugger(browser?: string) -> Aspire.Hosting.JavaScript/Aspire.Hosting.JavaScript.JavaScriptAppResource
Aspire.Hosting.JavaScript/withBuildScript(scriptName: string, args?: string[]) -> Aspire.Hosting.JavaScript/Aspire.Hosting.JavaScript.JavaScriptAppResource
Aspire.Hosting.JavaScript/withBun(install?: boolean, installArgs?: string[]) -> Aspire.Hosting.JavaScript/Aspire.Hosting.JavaScript.JavaScriptAppResource
Aspire.Hosting.JavaScript/withNpm(install?: boolean, installCommand?: string, installArgs?: string[]) -> Aspire.Hosting.JavaScript/Aspire.Hosting.JavaScript.JavaScriptAppResource
Aspire.Hosting.JavaScript/withPnpm(install?: boolean, installArgs?: string[]) -> Aspire.Hosting.JavaScript/Aspire.Hosting.JavaScript.JavaScriptAppResource
Aspire.Hosting.JavaScript/withRunScript(scriptName: string, args?: string[]) -> Aspire.Hosting.JavaScript/Aspire.Hosting.JavaScript.JavaScriptAppResource
Aspire.Hosting.JavaScript/withViteConfig(configPath: string) -> Aspire.Hosting.JavaScript/Aspire.Hosting.JavaScript.ViteAppResource
